info.english_meaning: to understand to learn to know to realize to experience to be sad to meditate to think
info.hindI_arTa: samaJanA jAnanA duHKI honA DyAna karanA manana karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: sattAyAM vidyate jYAne vetti vinte vicAraRe ' (Slo. 111) iti devaH  ' matO ' iti vopadevaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'na hi praveda sukftasya panTAm' (f॰10.71.6) na praveda=suzWu na veda
'yA~Sca vidma yA~ u ca na pravidma' (f॰10.15.13)
'mA ta idaM puzwaM kaScana pravidata' (Sa॰brA॰1.9.1.5) mA pravidata=mA prApat=mA smAsadat

'samu vA ime prARA bidre ye ceBe ye ceme' (E0 brA0 36) saMvidre=saMvidrate=saMgacCante SirasyAH sapta ye prARA ye trayo'pAYca eva te svasTAnasTAH saMgatASca BaveyurdehapozadAH.. iti tatra zaq guruSizyavacanam
'yo vA rasAnna saMvetti' (suSrute 111311) saMvetti=anuBavati
'icCAmyahaM varamasmE pradAtuM tanme viprAH saMvidaDvaM yaTAvat' (BA0 Adi0 561) anumanyaDvamityAha
'te pfTagdarSanAstasya saMvidanti taTEkatAm' (BA0 SA0 28028) saMvidanti=aByupagacCanti
'amba nizpara samarIrvidAm' (Sa0 brA0 39421)
'eza yAjuzo mantraH' (vA0 saM0 636) arIH prajAH saMjAnatAm EkamatyamaDigacCantvityAha
'apa SatrUn viDyatAM saMvidAne ArtnI ime' (vA0 saM0 2941)  saMvidAne=parasparaM saMketaM kurvARe
'yamena tvaM yamyA saMvidAnA' (vA0 saM0 1263) saMvidAnA=EkamatyaM gatA
'varzati hEva tatra yatrEvamftvijaH saMvidAnA yajYena caranti' (Sa0 brA0 15219) saMvidAnAH saMjAnAnAH
'aNgiroBiH pitfBiH saMvidAnaH' (f0 10144) saMjAnAnaH=EkamatyaM gataH
'tvaM soma pitfBiH saMvidAnaH' (f0 84813)
'tanmftyunA nirftiH saMvidAnA' (aTarva 7731) ukto'rTaH
'tO hA'saMvidAnAveva samitpARI prajApatisakASamAjagmatuH' (CAM0 u0 872) vipratipadyamAnAvevetyAha
'asaMvidAnasya mameSa saMvidAm' (ki0 1842) asaMvidAnaH=ajYaH
'tat kimityasaMvidAneva jAmAtre kupyasi' (uttara0 7) ukto'rTaH
'saMvittaH sahayuDvAnO tacCaktiM KaradUzaRO' (Bawwi0 537) saMvittaH samyagjAnItaH

'akarotsaMvidaM tena pARqavena mahAtmanA' (BA0 u0 16737) saMvit=mEtrI
'raTasTAH saMvidaM kftvA suKAM pfzwvA ca SarvarIm' (BA0 SAM0 5320)  saMvit… pratizWita AcAraH SAstradfzwo viDirvA
'prasAdino'nujJitagotrasaMvidaH' (SiSu0 1235) gotrasaMvit=kulAcAraH
'rahasi savido yA hfdispfSaH' ( ) saMvidaH saMlApAH
'kftvA strIBistu saMvidam' (BA0 saBA0 5834) ukto'rTaH
'yatreme sadasadrUpe pratizidDe svasaMvidA' (BA0 pu0 1333) svasaMvidA=AtmAnuBavena
'tvatsnehasaMvidavalambitajIvitAni' (mAlatI0 613) saMvit=jYAnam
'sa rAjalokaH kftapUrvasaMvit' (raGu0 731)  saMvit saMketaH
'stutIralaBamAnAnAM saMvidaM vedaniScitAn' (BA0 SAM0 1516) saMvid=darSanEkyam
'sanetya tAnnaravyAGrAMstava dAsyAmi saMvidam' (BA0 droRa0 1272) saMvid=jYaptiH=jYApanam
'tataH sa duHKasantapto nAlaBatsaMvidaM kvacit' (hari0 13012) saMvidam=svAsTyajYAnopAyam (nIla0)
'yaTA ca tvAM na paSyeyuH kurvARAM tena saMvidam'  (BA0 vi0 225) saMvidam=saMketam
'saMvit kriyApratijYAyAmAcAre jYAnagahvare saMBAzaRe kriyAkAre saMkete nAmni BAzyate' (medinI)..
'SvastvayA suKasaMvittiH smaraRIyADunAtanI' (ki0 1134) suKasaMvittiH=sOKyAnuBavaH=suKAsvAdaH**
'paScAcCizyasakASAttu kAlaH saMvidito mayA' (hari0 11922) saMvidito viditaH nArTaH samA
'vAgGyazwamI brahmaRA saMvitte' (bfha0 u0 223) saMvitte saMvAdaM karoti
'na cAyaM smartA sarvaM smftihetuM saMvedayate' (nyABA0 3234) saMvedayate cetayate'nuBavati

'kftvA tu tO yaTAnyAyaM yaTArhaM tena saMvidam' (durgA0 128) saMvidaM saMBAzAm

'saMvidA deyam' (tE0 u0 1113) saMvinmEtrI
'tasmAd brAhmaRaH pARqityaM nirvidya bAlyena tizWAset' (bf0 u0 351) nirvidya niHSezeRa viditveti SaNkaraH prApyeti gopAlAnandasvAmI
'sato banDumasati niravindan' (f0 10129 4) anvizyAvindan prApnuvan
'aTa svapnasya nirvide'BuYjataSca revataH' (f0 112012) nirvide=nirmokzAya parihftaye

'iti namraM nivedayAmaH' vijYApayAma ityarTaH
'bIBatsuSca mahAtejA nivedayati te gfhAn' (BA0 ASrama0 133) nivedayati gfhA gfhyantAmiti nivedayati upaharati

'upasTitAM homavelAM gurave nivedayAmi' (SA0 4) nivedayAmi SaMsAmi

'darSitaM kfpaRatvaM ca kfzRe'rGasya nivedanAt' (BA0 saBA0 37124) arGasya nivedanAt pUjopahArAt

'pfTivyASca nivedanam' (rA0 1325) dvIpasamudrAdisaMniveSakaTanam

prayoga.literature_text: nAsO na kAmyo na ca veda samyak
hriyamARAM tadA vIro na tu mAM veda
yo hyarTaM bahuDA veda sa samarTo'rTasADane
vE na veda yaste'strabalaM balaM ca te
hanumato veda na rAkzaso'ntaraM na mArutiH
vaDyAM na mAM vetsi hi rAkzasAnAm
na vetsi nUnaM yata evamAtTa mAm
avinASi tu tadvidDi yena sarvamidaM tatam
yaM saMnyAsamiti prAhuryogaM taM vidDi pARqava
mamApi dayitaM vidDi kanizWaM SunakaM nfpa
